version_delta: PR governance workflow no longer runs the full governance test suite on pull_request; full validator tests and full governance validation are reserved for schedule or manual all scope. Stop Hook suggestions now point only to changed-only CI and expose a read-only event matrix and budget policy. Changed-only CI summaries include project-scope budget telemetry.

ci_attestation_subject: Other8 S2PCT02 moves full governance computation out of PR and Stop Hook default paths while preserving changed-scope truth.
summary: S2PCT02 makes PR/main paths use the changed-only fast gate, keeps Stop Hook advisory and zero-write, exposes budget telemetry from the changed-only CI summary, and adds a read-only budget guard matching the roadmap test command.
rollback: Revert workflow, Stop Hook, lean_governance budget telemetry, governance_setup_doctor check, budget_guard, focused tests, and this manifest.
unresolved_risks: GitHub branch protection and Codex app hook trust remain externally UNVERIFIED without authenticated GitHub/App state.
Full governance validator tests are intentionally not run on PR; schedule/manual all remains the high-risk release gate.
Existing Serenity-Alipay semantic extractor mismatch remains outside this S2PCT02 scope and must be handled by later semantic remediation or manual all gate work.
self_reference_policy: content_tree_hash excludes this manifest because a file cannot contain its own final hash before commit; changed_files_actual includes this manifest for diff coverage.
